test.name: Complete Selenium Web Form Demo

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\elkku\\OneDrive\\Tiedostot\\Web-Dev\\front-end\\hyte-projekti\\browser\\traces\\temp\\2910de62-3756-4c99-b279-4096d9af0433"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.selenium.dev/selenium/web/web-form.html
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'testiuser' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Secret
kw.doc: Types the given secret from ``variable_name`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'Hello, Robot Framework! How are you today?' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [name="my-select"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) 2 by attribute SelectAttribute.value from element [name="my-select"].
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'San Francisco' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: TimeoutError: locator.click: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('[name="my-check-1"]') - waiting for" https://www.selenium.dev/selenium/web/submitted-form.html?my-text=testiuser&my-password=testisalis&my-textarea=Hello%2C+Robot+Framework%21%0D%0AHow+are+you+today%3F&my-readonly=Readonly+input&my-sele…" navigation to finish... - navigated to "https://www.selenium.dev/selenium/web/submitted-form.html?my-text=testiuser&my-password=testisalis&my-textarea=Hello%2C+Robot+Framework%21%0D%0AHow+are+you+today%3F&my-readonly=Readonly+input&my-sele…"
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
